nodes.name: create_source.sql
nodes.summary: Defines the RisingWave source table for the Superset integration test, providing streaming data for BI visualization via Apache Superset.

nodes.name: create_mv.sql
nodes.summary: Creates a materialized view aggregating source data for visualization in Apache Superset during the integration test.

nodes.name: query.sql
nodes.summary: Validation query executed against the materialized view to verify data availability in the Superset integration test.

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose file orchestrating RisingWave, Superset, Redis (Superset session store), and PostgreSQL (Superset metadata DB) for the BI integration test.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Superset extension anchors (x-superset-image, x-superset-depends-on, x-superset-volumes) to share config across multiple Superset service replicas.
